description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish DEB Packages that can be triggered manually with a workflow dispatch or called by another workflow. The workflow takes two required inputs: channel and run_id. It uses a matrix strategy to build and publish DEB packages for multiple distributions (debian12 and ubuntu24.04) on an ubuntu-24.04 environment. For each distribution, it checks out the repository, downloads DEB artifacts using a GitHub token and a run ID, creates a DEB repository by syncing from S3, adding new packages, and then uploading the updated repository to S3.
